title: Aluminium Rallies As Russian Sanctions Loom
section_path: Aluminium Rallies As Russian Sanctions Loom
section_path_text: Aluminium Rallies As Russian Sanctions Loom
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Supply side issues were back in focus amid a dearth of economic data. Geopolitical tensions remained supportive in the energy sector, while price-induced closures continued in metals. Aluminium led the base metals sector higher as supply side issues came back into focus.
